3256490.name: Wings of Endless Demo
3256490.description:
Discover the secret of a forgotten war in Wings of Endless DEMO, a platforming Action-RPG with a captivating Pixelart style that will draw you in from start to finish.

Step into the role of Hariku, a brash bounty hunter who boasts of being the best at his craft, as you embark on your first grand mission.

What's included in this demo:

  • Experience approximately the first hour of Wings of Endless.

  • Traverse the Abandoned Ruins, the first dungeon area.

  • Face and defeat the first boss of the game.

  • Explore the beginning of an epic fantasy world, starting with the Rocky Grasslands.

  • Uncover hidden secrets and objects throughout your journey.

  • Visit Green Harbor, the first city, and take on a couple of side quests.

  • Engage with multiple enemy types and solve intriguing puzzles.

Immerse yourself in this thrilling adventure and get a taste of the full Wings of Endless experience!
3256490.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
